markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the proposed SEO and content strategy collaboration between StackBlitz and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed a comprehensive SEO and content strategy, focusing on programmatic template pages and editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [StackBlitz team is interested but wants to ensure proper resourcing and implementation on their end](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [The proposed engagement would start with a 30-60 day pilot period, with potential for a longer-term collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2525.0)
  - [GrowthX is holding a spot for StackBlitz to start on April 7th, pending confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=3164.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO and Template Pages

  - [Focus on creating template pages for various app ideas (e.g., CRM for dentists)](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Utilize AI-generated prompts to kickstart projects in StackBlitz](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
  - [Aim to build a directory of app ideas, similar to Dribble for designers](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Gradually evolve from ideation pages to more complex starter kits](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Initially less prioritized than programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Potential for future blog posts and listicles to capture different user intents](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Aim to build topical authority across various app-building topics](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [StackBlitz team to determine how to integrate new pages into their existing Remix app](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)
  - [Consideration for creating a subfolder to host the new content/directory](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Potential to use StackBlitz itself to build and document the implementation process](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)

### Resourcing and Timeline

  - [StackBlitz team to discuss internal resourcing to support the initiative](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a 12-month engagement but is open to discussion](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Emphasis on the need for expert supervision and iterative improvement over time](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)

### Quality and Expertise Concerns

  - [Discussion on ensuring high-quality content that demonstrates product knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [GrowthX highlighted their experience with technical clients and AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

## Next Steps

  - [StackBlitz team to discuss internally and confirm resourcing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
  - [Provide a yes/no answer to GrowthX by tomorrow regarding the April 7th start date](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=3186.0)
  - [If confirmed, finalize the engagement details and statement of work this week](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=3217.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Alex to their Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/BsxmsvaingDCWRowztqLac-LLxhNW6NA?tab=summary&timestamp=3212.0)
